packet.name: A – ASU A, Berkeley A, Maryland A, WUSTL B

bonuses.leadin: Lars Sonck included a massive granite tower on an Art Nouveau church that he designed in this city’s Kallio district. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this city whose neoclassical cathedral is located at the center of its Senate Square. An event venue made entirely of Carrara marble was designed in this city by Alvar Aalto, an architect from this city.
Helsinki Central Station and the National Museum of Finland were both designed by an architect with this surname. That architect’s son with this surname designed the Gateway Arch in St. Louis.

Buildings designed by the Saarinens in this US city include Eliel’s First Christian Church and Eero’s Miller House, which has one of the first conversation pits. A 2017 film by Kogonada set in this city traces Jin and Casey’s brief friendship among this city’s renowned architecture.
answers_sanitized: Helsinki [or Helsingfors] (The Aalto building is Finlandia Hall.)
Saarinen [accept Eliel Saarinen; accept Eero Saarinen]
bonuses.leadin_sanitized: Lars Sonck included a massive granite tower on an Art Nouveau church that he designed in this city's Kallio district. For 10 points each:
parts_sanitized: Name this city whose neoclassical cathedral is located at the center of its Senate Square. An event venue made entirely of Carrara marble was designed in this city by Alvar Aalto, an architect from this city.
Helsinki Central Station and the National Museum of Finland were both designed by an architect with this surname. That architect's son with this surname designed the Gateway Arch in St. Louis.

Buildings designed by the Saarinens in this US city include Eliel's First Christian Church and Eero's Miller House, which has one of the first conversation pits. A 2017 film by Kogonada set in this city traces Jin and Casey's brief friendship among this city's renowned architecture.

bonuses.leadin: The Carrara marble exterior of this building has had to be replaced due to warping, a mistake that its architect did not repeat in his design for the performing arts center in Essen. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this building, meant to be viewed by traffic proceeding down Freedom Avenue in accordance with its designer’s desire to build off the work of Eliel Saarinen.
This architect designed the Finlandia Hall. He included a moon garden roof in his Baker House, found at MIT, and he also designed the Vyborg Library.
Aalto’s Saynatsalo Town Hall is found in this city, considered to be his home, where he designed many buildings including many for its namesake university.
